title: CL COSMOS LAC Russian Vanilla Yellow Chalk Effect Spray Paint, Smooth Touch Matt Finish All Purpose DIY Shabby Chic/Vintage Furniture
features: 🤹‍♀️VERSATILE: With the high-quality chalk spray paint, you can easily implement all your DIY projects. Perfectly suited as chalk furniture paint to create your own shabby chic / vintage furniture
🎨 INDIVIDUAL: The chalk paint is available in 14 great, very modern chalk colors (matt). For optimal protection and the perfect seal, we recommend the Chalk Effect seal, which maintains the matt look
💨 CHOOSE YOUR SPRAY HEAD: The decorative spray comes with two different spray caps - 1x for very fine spray work - 1x with a large opening
⬜ MATT CHALK PAINTS: Perfect as a furniture paint to let furniture, shelves or decorative elements shine in a new shine. The chalk paint is also suitable for handicrafts as wood or concrete paint

💫 VERY ECONOMICAL: With a spray can you can paint approx. 4 m² without any problems - and without any formation of a nose. With the help of the supplied instructions, nothing stands in the way of the perfect Chalky Finish end result
description: From the brand Previous page What can Cosmos LAC help? Cosmos LAC is the ideal upcycling aid. Before you buy something new, you should try our spray first. Whether matte, shiny or chalk look – everything is possible! Who can use COSMOS LAC? Everyone! That's the good thing. The spray requires no prior knowledge and delivers beautiful results in no time. What makes our product unique? The high-quality Cosmos LAC acrylic paint brings colour to your home. Whether it's an old piece of furniture or the simple flower vase – with Cosmos LAC you can make something very special We are Climate Partner! We want to make our contribution to climate protection. For this reason, we have certified our company by ClimatePartner with the label 'climate-neutral'. This means that all CO2 emissions generated at our locations are offset by us. At the same time, we help support a climate protection project for afforestation in Nicaragua. Discover more now! Visit the store Next page
